name: Language and Voice Support for Azure Speech - Foundry Tools
snippet: Learn about language and voice support in Azure Speech for speech to text, text to speech, speech translation, and more.

name: Is there any text-to-speech program for the Malay language? - Quora
snippet:
The web browser version of Google translate offers voice recognition and text to speech. I would just use that to start of with.
Change the TTS language to Malay from the top-left corner of the site, below the site title. Start writing some sentences or words in the box.

name: Text-to-Speech: Lifelike AI voices and speech synthesis
